subject: Initial test commit for project-specific CSIT
commit_message:
Initial test commit for project-specific CSIT

 - move music-distributed-kv-store CSIT to its own project repository
 - add execution script that copies required common run scripts from
   integration/csit repo to local workspace and runs the tests
 - add the possibility to provide additional docker tag as parameter
   to the build script
 - add script for tagging specified docker image with STAGING
Issue-ID: INT-1769
Signed-off-by: Lasse Kaihlavirta <l.kaihlavirt@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: I19a5908f3c9c77529c43af0d89baf75a8f8557ee

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/music-distributed-kv-store-master-verify-golang/53/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/music-distributed-kv-store-master-verify-golang/53

Patch Set 1:

@Bharath Balasubramanian, please note that I am using this component to develop and design new project-specific CSIT (see https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Moving+CSIT+to+project+repositories) since this project is now in maintenance mode and its test case is simple and quick to run. There will probably be a few more commits related to this to follow, so speedy merges would be appreciated as I can not conveniently test these in sandbox any longer :)

Patch Set 3:

Ok, now that https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/114597 is merged, we have first round of results - and everything except gerrit trigger seems to be working as expected. For some reason the trigger path has "**/music/distributed-kv-store/**" (as opposed to just ** like, for example, in music-distributed-kv-store-master-verify-golang) - I'll have to look into the JJB and fix that

Patch Set 3:

Patch Set 4:

Ok, this is working as I wanted now - the review triggers the umbrella job, which in turn executes the docker build and then CSIT in sequence, and finally the failing CSIT votes the review down. The question now is how do we move forward with this? I'll need to have this in master in order to test my next changes to JJB templates in sandbox.

Patch Set 4:

There doesn't seem to be any reaction from project owners (neither to this commit nor to the onap-discuss mail that Morgan sent) so maybe let's merge this and move on? It will have the effect of failing to verify any commits to music for a short while but I should fix that quite quickly in the following changes.
